name: Fajita Seasoning
author: Traci Meeds
description: Make your own fajita seasoning for chicken or beef fajitas with this easy recipe. No bouillon cubes means this is perfect for vegetarians, too!

steps: Stir cornstarch, chili powder, salt, paprika, sugar, onion powder, garlic powder, cumin, and cayenne pepper together in a small bowl.
Use immediately in your favorite fajita recipe, or store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place for up to 6 months.

notes:
Make up a larger batch and store in an airtight container for future use.
